title: The AI Infrastructure crisis: When ambition meets ancient systems
author: The New Stack
excerpt: 这篇文章围绕“The AI Infrastructure crisis: When ambition meets ancient systems”展开，RSS 摘要提到：Is legacy IT holding back your AI ambition? Discover the four pillars of AI-ready infrastructure to modernize your technology stack.

content.heading: 文章核心
paragraphs: 基于 RSS 摘要与页面元数据，原文重点是：Is legacy IT holding back your AI ambition? Discover the four pillars of AI-ready infrastructure to modernize your technology stack.

content.heading: 值得继续补充的点
paragraphs: 如果后续补齐详情视图，重点可以继续展开架构取舍、生产约束、性能代价和工程实施方式。
